extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables distinguish matters against the Company and subsidiary from matters filed by them; I counted only the against rows, excluding the Company’s 2 criminal and 1 civil matters filed by it, and counted criminal, statutory/regulatory and tax categories separately. Against the Company and subsidiary, criminal proceedings are nil, statutory/regulatory proceedings comprise 1 matter against the Promoter only, and tax proceedings against the Company comprise 7 direct-tax and 6 indirect-tax matters; the quantified group amount is ₹110.22 lakhs civil against the Company plus ₹3,708.78 lakhs tax against the Company, totaling ₹3,819.00 lakhs, or ₹38.19 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is sourced from the stated line items as at December 31, 2021; because no stated Total row is shown, the disclosed items sum to ₹3,708.78 lakhs, or ₹37.0878 crore. The only concentration percentages shown concern individual stores rather than company-wide top customers, so customer concentration is not extracted; the source unit is ₹ lakhs and conversion to crore is by dividing by 100.
